# ALPINNO GmbH

> ALPINNO is a Swiss consulting and technology company helping organisations harness AI, create valuable innovations and establish the agile processes needed to turn opportunities into results.

Canonical website: https://lad-plunk.github.io/ALPINNO-GmbH/

## Core offerings

- AI transformation, implementation, governance, training and capability building
- AI-assisted front-end innovation, invention development and intellectual-property support
- Agile execution, project and programme management, PMO and innovation governance
- AIdea, ALPINNO's proprietary AI-assisted innovation and invention software

## AIdea

AIdea guides expert-led teams through a configurable, evidence-grounded innovation process. It connects proprietary company knowledge, customer insight and public intelligence to traceable opportunities, ideas, concepts, patentable inventions and invention disclosures.

AIdea may be provided through ALPINNO-led projects, supported local installations, private-cloud or customer-hosted arrangements, selected beta access and tailored licensing.

## Important context

- AIdea is human-led and AI-assisted.
- Preliminary prior-art and pre-FTO work is technical early-stage support, not a formal legal opinion.
- Performance statements on the website are founder-observed results and are identified as such.

## Automated access

Public search and AI crawlers, including AI-search and model-training crawlers, may access the public website under robots.txt.
